channel.title: Launch Rocket — Insights & Regulatory Updates
channel.description: India certification, labelling, marketplace policy and e-commerce growth guides from Launch Rocket (LaRo Advisors).

item.title: Improvement Notice Under the Legal Metrology Act 2026: Fix-First Compliance Explained
item.description: On 29 June 2026 India introduced an Improvement Notice mechanism under the Legal Metrology Act via the Jan Vishwas Act 2026. First-time labelling and registration lapses now get a chance to fix before penalty. Full guide for brands and e-commerce sellers.

item.title: Transition Facilitation (Quality Control) Order 2026: BIS Scheme II Sourcing Explained
item.description: On 25 June 2026 DPIIT issued the Transition Facilitation (Quality Control) Order 2026, letting permitted companies source from BIS Scheme II (SDoC) manufacturers across 10 QCO categories. What brands, assemblers and manufacturers need to know.

item.title: BIS Expands CRS Mandatory Categories: Smart Home, Wearables & Power Banks
item.description: BIS has expanded the Compulsory Registration Scheme (CRS) to smart home devices, wearables, and power banks. E-commerce sellers on Amazon and Flipkart must now upload BIS certificates or face listing suppression.

item.title: FCC vs CE vs ISED: Which Type Approvals Does Your Connected Device Need in 2026?
item.description: FCC, CE under RED, and ISED are the three most important type approvals for wireless and connected products entering USA, EU, and Canadian markets. This guide explains each, how to sequence them, and how to share test reports across markets.

item.title: EPR Annual Return FY 2025-26: Complete Checklist for E-Waste, Battery & Plastics Importers
item.description: Complete checklist and step-by-step guide for filing EPR annual returns for FY 2025-26 — e-waste, battery waste, and plastic packaging importers and producers in India.

item.title: FSSAI Central License for Food Importers 2026: Requirements, Rejections & Approval Guide
item.description: All food importers in India require a Central FSSAI License before customs clearance. Updated 2026 requirements, common rejection reasons, and step-by-step process.

item.title: Legal Metrology Labelling for E-Commerce 2026: What Every Amazon India & Flipkart Seller Must Display
item.description: India's Legal Metrology Rules require MRP, net quantity, importer name, and country of origin on all packaged goods. Marketplaces now enforce this at listing level. Full 2026 compliance guide.
